name: rad-stripe-fastify-webhooks
description: RAD Stripe-Fastify Webhooks — production-grade Stripe webhook handling with Fastify and Zod. Covers signature verification with raw body access, subscription state machine management, idempotent event processing, Zod schema contracts for webhook payloads, entitlement engine architecture, thin events migration, reconciliation patterns, security boundaries, and testing with fastify.inject().
